## Test plan

- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes locally
- [ ] If user-visible: ran `pnpm changeset` and committed the changeset
- [ ] If the Action surface changed: updated `action.yml` inputs/outputs and the README table
- [ ] Tested locally with `pnpm --filter portfoliocraft start generate --user <login> --dry-run --explain`
